title: Fry Self-Improvement Roadmap
description: Canonical schema for the self-improvement roadmap. Completed items are removed; git history is the archive.

version.description: Schema version. Bump when the schema changes.

id.description: Unique identifier. Letter prefix indicates category, followed by a sequence number. Empty string allowed for new findings (orchestrator assigns IDs).

category.description: A=bug, B=testing, C=feature, D=improvement, E=sunset, F=refactor, G=security, H=ui_ux, I=documentation.

title.description: Short descriptive title of the issue or feature.

priority.description: For bugs/testing: severity. For features/improvements: impact.

effort.description: Estimated implementation effort. Optional for bugs/testing.

items.description: File path, optionally with line number (e.g., 'internal/cli/run.go:296').

description.description: Detailed description of the problem or opportunity.

fix.description: Concrete implementation plan or fix description.

status.description: Current status. Completed items are removed from the roadmap.

discovered.description: ISO 8601 date when the item was first identified.

pr_url.description: GitHub pull request URL. Set when status is 'pr_created'.

attempted_count.description: Number of times a build was attempted for this item. Incremented on failure.
